g.text: PASSIVE ZONE — the sidewalk's desire line
G8 The desire line misses the alcove — where people actually walked
1.27M raw positions (Mar 15–17). Pedestrians travel the band z 350–450 cm; entering the active zone means stepping out of the river. The geometry beneath the 3.6% active share.
